_comment: Source-of-truth for shipped 3D assets. scripts/optimize-assets.ts reads `assets`, compresses each entry, and writes the result to public/models/optimized/<output>. Each entry: { input, output, role }. Inputs are paths under public/models/ (raw, gitignored). Outputs are committed.

assets.role: Player character — Mixamo-rigged suited agent with Walking/Idle/Look Around animations. The 'Eyewear' mesh is the sunglasses; animated to scale=0 for the Café Zack face-reveal beat.
Maqam Echahid landmark — south anchor of the open world, opens the Skills panel. Iconic concrete tri-fronds of the Martyrs' Memorial. Procedural plinth/colliders stay; the GLB is the visual.
Casbah landmark — west anchor, opens the Projects panel. Low-poly traditional Algiers house standing in for the Casbah quarter; high-poly variant kept in source for a later LOD pass.
Djamaa el-Djedid mosque — decorative POI along the route between landmarks; not yet a panel anchor.

Refined suit character — Adobe-Fuse-style PBR human in a tailored suit (~21 MB source with sidecar textures). No baked animations on the source, so face-reveal uses a hair/glasses mesh instead of the previous 1940s Spy's Eyewearmesh. Walk/Idle animations grafted from the agent-spy rig at load time.
